name: V26.7.0
body:
# Aspose.Cells_FOSS Release Notes - V26.7.0

## Highlights
- Improved drawing round-trip preservation so raw shape relationships and generated drawing object identifiers survive save with fewer collisions.
- Hardened chart XML save normalization for preserved charts and modern chart extensions that Excel can reject or rewrite.
- Refined packaging metadata for NuGet distribution, including package icon and symbol/source-package generation.

## Added
- Added preserved worksheet drawing relationship tracking so non-picture, non-chart relationships referenced from raw shape XML can be loaded and written back on save.
- Added generated drawing object ID allocation that starts after preserved object IDs found in raw shape and chart markup.
- Added package icon metadata and packaged `icon.png`.
- Added symbol package and reproducible-build metadata: `DebugType=portable`, `IncludeSymbols=true`, `SymbolPackageFormat=snupkg`, `ContinuousIntegrationBuild=true`, and `EmbedUntrackedSources=true`.

## Changed
- Normalized preserved drawing markup before save so shape transforms are emitted in DrawingML namespaces and Office 2014 creation IDs are rewritten in canonical uppercase-braced GUID form.
- Expanded drawing relationship remapping so preserved raw-shape relationship IDs participate in generated drawing `.rels` output.
- Chart save now removes invalid or empty extension markup such as unsupported chart-2012 leader-line nodes, empty `ext`/`extLst` containers, surface-chart `varyColors`, and selected chartEx series color extensions.
- Surface chart template output no longer writes `<c:varyColors>` for generated surface charts.
- Font serialization now writes `<name>` before optional `<family>` and `<scheme>` metadata, aligning emitted font child ordering more closely with typical OOXML writer output.
- Worksheet protection loading now infers `IsProtected=true` when protection flags or hash metadata exist even if the `sheet` attribute is absent.
- Packaging now uses repository-relative license inclusion instead of an absolute local path.

## Improved Compatibility
- Raw shapes that reference preserved drawing relationships now have a better chance of round-tripping without losing external or nonstandard drawing relationship entries.
- Preserved chart XML is sanitized on save to reduce invalid OOXML combinations that can trigger workbook repair in Excel-compatible consumers.
- Worksheet protection state is preserved more faithfully for files that omit `sheetProtection@sheet` but still carry effective protection settings.

name: V26.6.0
body:
# Aspose.Cells_FOSS Release Notes - V26.6.0

## Release Date
2026-06-15



## Highlights
- Improved workbook round-trip fidelity for worksheet view settings, sheet default sizing metadata, and row/column-level styles.
- Expanded chart and drawing preservation so more existing workbook content can be loaded and saved without being dropped.
- Refined style and font serialization to better preserve OOXML-compatible formatting details.

## Added
- Added `Font.Equals(object)` and `Font.GetHashCode()` overrides for value-style font comparisons.
- Added `FontUnderlineType` as the public underline enum used by the current font model.
- Added `StyleFlag` to support selective style application scenarios.
- Added worksheet view metadata support for `ViewType`, `TopLeftCell`, `TabSelected`, `SelectionActiveCell`, and `SelectionSqref`.
- Added worksheet sheet-format metadata support for `BaseColumnWidth`, `DefaultColumnWidth`, `DefaultRowHeight`, and `CustomHeight`.
- Added resolved row and column metadata styles so row/column formatting can be preserved independently of raw style indexes.
- Added internal font metadata support for OOXML font `family` and `scheme` values.
- Added support for preserved raw-shape chart references so chart parts embedded through retained drawing XML can be carried forward on save.

## Changed
- `Cell.Type` mapping now returns `CellValueType.IsError` for error-valued cells instead of falling back to `IsUnknown`.
- Worksheet view load/save now persists selection and top-left-cell information in addition to the existing visibility and zoom settings.
- Worksheet writer now emits `sheetFormatPr` when default row or column sizing metadata exists.
- Row and column metadata styles are now resolved to concrete style values during load and re-interned during save, improving style preservation through round-trip serialization.
- Differential style fill handling was corrected so visible fill colors are mapped correctly for `dxf` records.
- Worksheet protection parsing now defaults `sheetProtection@sheet` to `false` when the attribute is absent, and serialization only writes `sheet="1"` when protection is actually enabled.
- Drawing relationship remapping now covers pictures, shape images, charts, and preserved charts without accidental replacement collisions.

## Improved Compatibility
- Chart companion images referenced from chart relationships are now loaded from package parts and written back to `xl/media` during save.
- Preserved chart parts now participate in drawing relationships, content types, part-name allocation, and chart-file numbering.
- Column and row metadata styles now survive load/save even when they are not directly attached to persisted cell records.
- Font family and theme scheme metadata are now preserved in stylesheet font records.

name: V26.5.0
body:
# Aspose.Cells_FOSS Release Notes - V26.5.0

## Release Date
2026-05-20


## Highlights
This release focuses on Aspose-compatible API alignment, style/font model enhancements, and release documentation improvements for samples and quick start usage.

## Added
- Added `FontUnderlineType` enum for richer underline semantics (`None`, `Single`, `Double`, `Accounting`, `Wave`, etc.).
- Added `StyleFlag` class and `Cell.SetStyle(Style, StyleFlag)` for selective style application.
- Added `Cell.PutValue(object)` for generalized value assignment.
- Added string-conversion overloads:
  - `Cell.PutValue(string, bool isConverted)`
  - `Cell.PutValue(string, bool isConverted, bool setStyle)`
- Added Aspose-compatible overload shapes:
  - `Cell.GetStyle(bool checkBorders)`
  - `Cell.SetStyle(Style, bool explicitFlag)`
- Added `Style.Copy(Style source)`.
- Added `Style.QuotePrefix` support and mapped it through style load/save flow.
- Added `HyperlinkCollection.Capacity` and `HyperlinkCollection.Clear()`.

## Changed
- Font API aligned toward Aspose naming and behavior:
  - `Bold` -> `IsBold`
  - `Italic` -> `IsItalic`
  - `StrikeThrough` -> `IsStrikeout`
  - `Underline` now uses `FontUnderlineType` (not `bool`)
  - Added `DoubleSize` and `ArgbColor` helpers.
- `Style.Font` and `Style.Borders` setters were tightened (`private set`) to enforce object-level mutation patterns.
- `CellValueType` enum was reworked to Aspose-like values:
  - old values (`Blank`, `String`, `Number`, `Boolean`, `DateTime`, `Formula`)
  - replaced by (`IsUnknown`, `IsNull`, `IsNumeric`, `IsDateTime`, `IsString`, `IsBool`, `IsError`)
- `CellArea` shape was revised to Aspose-like boundaries (`StartRow`, `EndRow`, `StartColumn`, `EndColumn`) and now implements `IComparable`.
- `Hyperlink` and `HyperlinkCollection` changed from `sealed` to non-sealed.
- Updated `README.md` and `samples/README.md` with cleaner quick-start/build/sample-run instructions.

## Behavior Notes
- `PutValue(string, isConverted: true)` now attempts parse in order: integer -> double -> bool -> DateTime -> string.
- `SetStyle(Style, StyleFlag)` applies only flagged style aspects and leaves other aspects unchanged.

## Potential Breaking Changes
- Source-breaking rename/shape changes in `Font` properties (`Bold`/`Italic`/`StrikeThrough`, and `Underline` type change).
- `CellValueType` member names/values changed and may break enum comparisons/switch logic.
- `CellArea` property model changed from first/total semantics to start/end semantics.
- `Style.Font` and `Style.Borders` are no longer assignable as whole-object setters.
- Multiple internal model/packaging/xml types were visibility-restricted for public API cleanup; direct external usage of those internals may break.

name: V26.4.2
body:
# Release V26.4.2

This is a feature release for Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET.

## What's Changed

### New Features

- **Excel Tables (ListObjects)** — Added full read/write support for Excel structured tables via `ListObject`, `ListObjectCollection`, `ListColumn`, and `ListColumnCollection`. Supports table creation, named columns, header and totals rows, and all built-in table styles (`TableStyleType`). The `TotalsCalculation` enum covers aggregation functions (Sum, Count, Average, Max, Min, StdDev, Var, CountNums, Custom) for totals-row cells.

- **Comments** — Added `Comment` and `CommentCollection` to read and write legacy worksheet notes. Comments are anchored to a cell address and carry author, plain-text note content, and optional display-size hints. Full round-trip serialization is handled by the new `XlsxWorkbookCommentsLoader` and `XlsxWorkbookComments` components.

- **Pictures** — Added `Picture` and `PictureCollection` to embed and retrieve images anchored to worksheet cells. Supports PNG, JPEG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, and EMF/WMF via the `ImageType` enum. Image data is loaded and saved as raw bytes; anchor position and dimensions are exposed as row/column offsets. Serialization is handled by the new `XlsxWorkbookPicturesLoader` and `XlsxWorkbookPictures` components.

- **Shapes (Drawing Objects)** — Added `Shape` and `ShapeCollection` for auto-shape drawing objects. The `AutoShapeType` enum covers the full set of Office auto-shape categories (lines, rectangles, basic shapes, block arrows, callouts, flowchart symbols, stars and banners, and more). Shapes carry name, type, anchor position, dimensions, and optional fill and line formatting.

- **Charts** — Added read-only access to embedded charts via `Chart`, `ChartCollection`, and `ChartType`. Standard 2D types (Bar, Column, Line, Area, Pie, Doughnut, Scatter, Bubble, Radar, Stock) and their 3D variants are supported, as well as modern chartex types (Waterfall, Treemap, Sunburst, Histogram, Box and Whisker, Funnel, Map). Charts are preserved as opaque XML during save; new charts can be added using the built-in XML templates in `ChartXmlTemplates`.

### Serialization Improvements

- Refactored `XlsxWorkbookSerializer` and `XlsxWorkbookSerializerCommon` and introduced dedicated `XlsxWorkbookWorksheetLoader` and `XlsxWorkbookWorksheetWriter` to improve separation of concerns and support the new worksheet-level features.
- Extended `WorksheetModel` and `WorkbookModel` to carry the new tables, comments, pictures, shapes, and charts collections.

### New Sample Projects

- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.ListObjects` — demonstrates creating and reading Excel tables.
- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.Comments` — demonstrates adding and reading cell comments.
- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.Pictures` — demonstrates embedding and reading pictures.
- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.Shapes` — demonstrates adding and reading auto shapes.
- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.Charts` — demonstrates reading chart metadata from an existing workbook.
- `Aspose.Cells_FOSS.Samples.DocumentProperties` — demonstrates reading and writing core and extended document properties.

name: V26.4.1
body:
This is a maintenance patch release for Aspose.Cells FOSS for .NET.

## What's Changed

- Expanded XML documentation comments across the public API surface to improve IntelliSense and usage guidance.
- Refreshed repository documentation to better describe the current feature set, build flow, and sample projects.
- Added the MIT license file to the repository package.
- Change to support C#6.0 and above to provide more compatibility.
- Verified the core library project builds successfully for `netstandard2.0` and `net8.0`.
